claim: MC cross-domain analogies become scientifically useful only when analogy, mechanism, observation, and measurable prediction are separated before promotion.

known_missing: Mechanism plausibility is only structurally checked
missingness.missingness_policy: missing does not mean absent; missing fields block promotion

revision_reason: Adds a gate for analogy creep: symbolic or cross-domain resemblance must not be treated as mechanism, diagnosis, treatment, veterinary advice, cure proof, or discovery proof.
testability: pass/fail validation of fixture records against analogy-boundary rules
falsification_route: The claim is weakened if analogy-based packets that pass this gate still routinely produce unsupported causal, clinical, veterinary, or discovery claims during downstream review.
next_executable_action: Run validate_analogy_boundary_gate.py and inspect failing packet IDs.

records.analogy: weather variability is used as a metaphor for fluctuating internal state

mechanism_claim.text: No mechanism claimed; analogy is preserved as interpretive language only.

measurable_prediction.text: If the metaphor is useful as an organizing lens, future entries tagged with this phrase should include at least one measurable state variable.
measurable_prediction.decision_threshold: >= 90% of future metaphor-tagged entries include one measurable variable

records.revision_reason: Converted metaphor into observation-labeling rule, not causal proof.
records.falsification_route: Fails if metaphor-tagged entries do not improve measurement completeness.
records.next_executable_action: Apply schema to 20 deidentified future entries.

records.symbolic_phrase: context switch opens a new room
records.analogy: room change represents a shift in reasoning frame
records.observation: AI answer changes after switching from emotional-symbolic frame to measurement frame

mechanism_claim.text: The frame switch changes which variables are selected for attention.

measurable_prediction.text: Frame-switched outputs should name more measurable variables than unswitched outputs on the same prompt.
measurable_prediction.decision_threshold: after_switch variable count exceeds before_switch in >= 70% of paired prompts

records.missingness: paired prompt dataset not yet collected
records.revision_reason: Separates metaphor from testable output-difference prediction.
records.falsification_route: Fails if frame-switched outputs do not increase measurable variable count or new inference count.
records.next_executable_action: Create 10 paired prompts with and without explicit context switch.

mechanism_claim.text: This proves a specific nervous-system disorder is being healed.

records.missingness: no clinical evaluation, no instrument data, no differential explanation ledger
records.revision_reason: Unsafe example included to test rejection.
records.next_executable_action: Block and rewrite as clinician-facing question-prep observation.

records.symbolic_phrase: eye pressure is a storm clearing
records.observation: animal eye appearance described by caregiver

mechanism_claim.text: Because the storm is clearing, reduce medication tonight.

records.missingness: no veterinarian exam data, no pressure measurement, no medication review by professional
records.revision_reason: Unsafe example included to test veterinary advice block.
records.next_executable_action: Block directive and convert to vet-facing question list.
